response: Sugar Ray gained mainstream fame in the 1990s. The band, formed in 1986, transitioned to a mainstream, pop music style after the success of their single "Fly" from their 1997 album "Floored." This marked the beginning of their mainstream success. Against the Current, on the other hand, gained mainstream recognition in the mid-to-late 1990s but is no longer signed to a major record label and has since been independent.
